Debug.Name: Debug logging
Debug.Hint: Print verbose Boss Forge debug messages to the browser console (F12).

PromptMultiUse.Name: Multiple uses per prompt
PromptMultiUse.Hint: Reopen the legendary/lair action dialog after each use, allowing several actions on the same trigger (house rule). Off: the dialog closes after one use, as per RAW.

LegendaryPrompt.Name: Legendary action prompt
LegendaryPrompt.Hint: At the end of each other creature's turn, prompt the GM with the boss's available legendary actions.

LegresAnnounce.Name: Announce legendary resistance
LegresAnnounce.Hint: When the GM uses dnd5e's "Use Legendary Resistance" button on a save card, post a chat message and play the boss's burn FX (if configured).

LegresChatVisibility.Name: Legendary resistance chat message
LegresChatVisibility.Hint: Who sees the chat message when a legendary resistance is burned.

LairPrompt.Name: Lair orchestration
LairPrompt.Hint: Ask about lair mode at combat start (2024 rules, native +1 legendary action/resistance while inside) and prompt lair actions when initiative passes the boss's lair count (2014 rules).

Phases.Name: HP phases
Phases.Hint: Bosses configured with HP thresholds (api.phases.set) announce phase transitions, play their FX and toggle effects when their hit points cross a threshold.

Diagnostics.Title: Boss Forge — Diagnostics
Diagnostics.Instructions: Copy the full report below when reporting issues. It was also printed to the console (F12) and copied to your clipboard.
Diagnostics.Copied: Boss Forge: diagnostics report copied to clipboard.

Legendary.Prompt: End of {trigger}'s turn: {name} has {remaining} of {max} legendary actions available.
Legendary.OptOut: Don't ask again for this boss
Legendary.OptOutConfirmed: Boss Forge will no longer prompt legendary actions for {name}. Undo (with the boss token selected): game.modules.get("boss-forge").api.legendary.setPromptEnabled(canvas.tokens.controlled[0].actor)

LegRes.BurnMessage: {name} burns a Legendary Resistance and turns the failure into a success.

Phases.EffectNotFound: Phase config: no ActiveEffect named "{effect}" exists on {name}. Create one with that exact name (sheet → Effects) or fix the phase's effects list.
Phases.DeathTriggerFired: Phase trigger: every linked creature is down — {name} advances a phase.
Phases.GapTriggerFired: Phase trigger: HP gap of {gap}% between {name} and {other} — both advance a phase.

Lair.InsideDialogPrompt: {name} has a lair. Is this fight taking place inside it? While inside, dnd5e natively grants +1 max legendary action and resistance.
Lair.Activated: {name} is fighting inside its lair: +1 legendary action and resistance (native dnd5e adjustment). Boss Forge will revert the toggle when this combat ends.
Lair.AutoActivated: {name} is fighting inside its lair — the scene "{scene}" is marked as its lair. +1 legendary action and resistance; the toggle reverts when combat ends.
Lair.Deactivated: Combat ended: {name} is no longer inside its lair (module-set toggle reverted).
Lair.ActionsPrompt: Initiative count {initiative}, round {round}: {name} may take a lair action.
Lair.SceneMarked: Scene "{scene}" marked as the lair of {name}.
